textByHash.5bd1e5fe4fa16ab7897a0e552e267d050a693de6: To stand up properly. Otherwise I'd collapse into a gelatinous blob!
textByHash.45ca3ea91eef122ccc0b3b2c88b908b907a1ad61: No, seriously, I need bones to use as a Construction material. We always need big bones to prop up the mine shafts and to make other temporary structures.
textByHash.864c9ecb8058b0650eef980109ec2c57becb3ee3: Well, I've had a few people bring me some interesting giant shells. They say they came from giant snails and giant tortoises.
textByHash.74beee26214b07ba984c433e3f61f162c4d926c3: Of course, like the bones, some shells are better than others. I'll give you 250gp for ordinary shells, but what I really need are perfect shells. I'll pay double for them and give you a few tips about Crafting too.
textByHash.9a1757b3dff6779f576bd01fdc9455494a2bb5cd: Enormous bones, as big as you can get. Not just any big bones will do.
textByHash.e95febb09994fd858f76ae44446fc97bf4a60319: Sometimes you might find a particularly long, straight bone. That's the kind of thing I need; I'll give you 1,000gp for one of them.
textByHash.c7308987ecb7687f13825a60dd11ae42c3f89a08: Occasionally, you might find a long curved bone - these are especially valuable - I'll give you 2,000gp for them.
textByHash.afaf62c3fdd235663c16a391e3e4cd0df2aa6c54: I'll also teach you a bit about how we use the bones in Construction, if you like.
textByHash.b83f3a5ead8307b035d27266ea3578c4ecb80b45: Those bones! Those are exactly the sort of thing I need! Will you sell them?
textByHash.de303d4b3b4637b6d68b0338392faf7ad1096cc3: I'll give you gp for the bones you're carrying and for any you have in your bank.
textByHash.b881b848ff1ff11aef0ac0f8dd635b453e51e23c: I'll try to teach you something about Construction as well, but it's highly technical so you won't understand if you don't already have level 30 Construction.
textByHash.10895eabfb4fe82756a8272ceec9a313f07cbd5b: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them.
textByHash.d322ad090a2263b05c3976133a21d2084819d6dd: I'll give you gp for the snail shells you're carrying.
textByHash.621c7d0ed9f525febeee49f0c01045a8f3fd4d2e: Thanks. If you find any more shells like these, please bring them to me!
textByHash.7a90f7a6975bbc73638a4d505c67f4d8efdc6acc: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them, especially that perfect one.
textByHash.6f48ba6320f9a003e52c91a1842f4f04638c5488: I'll give you gp for the snail shell you're carrying, and I'll try to give you some advice on Crafting while I'm at it.
textByHash.72a1f595ad2e5957c9c35ab25f80823ec59ae526: Thanks! Now, I don't think I could use that for Construction, but maybe I could make something...
textByHash.07c3cd9367fe0c5f69611d952ce6be3bb505428f: Hmm... I think I might be able to make something out of them, especially those perfect ones.
textByHash.b4842807c40a77b18f210903cf67fb81bbacc1b5: I'll give you gp for the snail shells you're carrying, and I'll try to give you some advice on Crafting while I'm at it.
textByHash.cc91dc9af0bc4bc994981b2ab698aa9d9ba32209: I'll give you gp for the tortoise shells you're carrying.
textByHash.3e470597660c06a38469ba81a5daac438bc038a9: That other giant shell...what is it?
textByHash.27833c9bdde7e2a9a0d0b2700827c7d94899f595: I'll give you gp for the tortoise shell you're carrying, and I'll try to give you some advice on Crafting while I'm at it.
textByHash.61821c8bcb4a1d5bf92636035154f542440d489d: I'll give you gp for the tortoise shells you're carrying, and I'll try to give you some advice on Crafting while I'm at it.
